## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you want to see.

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives have you considered?

## Privacy, trust and scanning impact

Does this feature affect any of the following?

- Local-first behavior
- Folder permission flow
- Metadata handling
- User trust expectations around file access

If yes, explain exactly how.

## User impact

Who benefits from this and how?

## Possible implementation notes (optional)

Share ideas, constraints, or references if available.

## Additional context

Add mockups, examples, or related links if helpful.
